turns.thought: The swarm is completely collapsed: diversity near zero, velocity all zero, no improvement for 200 iterations, fitness variance negligible. All particles have essentially converged to the same point. This is severe premature convergence. To escape, we need to inject randomness by reinitializing some particles. reset_worst_particles with a ratio of 0.25 will replace the worst particles with random positions and velocities, restoring diversity and potentially discovering better regions.
turns.observation: Action 'reset_worst_particles' was applied. Reinitialized 8 weak particles to restore diversity. Best cost changed from 9.836664e-02 to 9.836664e-02 (delta=+0.000000e+00).

turns.thought: After resetting the worst 8 particles, the swarm remains stuck because 22 particles are still converged at the same local optimum with zero velocity. Only the 8 new particles are active, which is insufficient to escape. The stuck particles (which are the best) need to be perturbed to break their zero-velocity state and create diversity. Applying Gaussian mutation to the best particles will add noise to their positions and velocities, allowing the swarm to potentially explore away from the current local optimum.
turns.observation: Action 'gaussian_mutation' was applied. Applied Gaussian mutation to 21 particles. Best cost changed from 9.836664e-02 to 9.836664e-02 (delta=+0.000000e+00).

turns.thought: Despite resetting worst particles and applying Gaussian mutation to best particles, the best cost remains unchanged at 0.098366..., indicating the swarm is trapped in a deep local minimum and small perturbations are insufficient. Griewank is highly multimodal, so larger jumps are needed to escape this basin. Levy flights, with their heavy-tailed step distributions, can relocate particles to distant regions and potentially discover better valleys. I'll target the worst particles (which are essentially identical to best) to jump them far from the current optimum and restore meaningful diversity.
turns.observation: Action 'levy_flight' was applied. Applied Levy-flight jumps to 15 particles. Best cost changed from 9.836664e-02 to 9.836664e-02 (delta=+0.000000e+00).
